title: Ad Dammām Heat Wave
lead: Ad Dammām is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.94. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ad Dammām has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 31%, which is relatively low, but the temperature remains very high. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 9.4 km/h, but it does not provide much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
